meta_title: For Students: marketing automation to Solve can't validate ideas (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome can't validate ideas. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Marketing Automation to Validate SaaS Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn to use marketing automation to overcome the 'can't validate ideas' hurdle. An intermediate case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for students.
content.answer_block: Stop guessing and start measuring. By building an automated feedback loop that captures user intent before you write a single line of production code, you eliminate the risk of building products nobody wants. Use Antigravity to scaffold your landing page and Claude Code to deploy data-capture triggers instantly.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks in the dark, polishing a feature set for a product that hasn't seen a single user click. The silence from the market isn't just frustrating; it's a signal that your validation process is fundamentally broken. You are building in a vacuum, waiting for a 'big reveal' that rarely delivers the traction you deserve.

But what if you could treat validation like a deployment pipeline? By integrating marketing automation directly into your development workflow, you transform your project from a static idea into a living experiment. This is how senior engineers build: they ship, they measure, and they iterate based on cold, hard data.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition Hypotheses
steps.description: Before coding, articulate exactly what problem you are solving for whom. We will use this to generate our tracking events.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a landing page conversion event that tracks user pain points, email signups, and feature interest levels for a SaaS idea.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a marketing event schema based on user pain points'

steps.title: Scaffold the Validation Landing Page
steps.description: Build a high-converting landing page that acts as an automated funnel to capture early interest.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js landing page with Tailwind CSS that includes a waitlist form and automated email capture integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build a landing page with a waitlist form and posthog tracking'

steps.title: Automate Lead Nurturing Workflows
steps.description: Connect your signups to a CRM to automatically send follow-up surveys to understand why they signed up.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a webhook endpoint that receives form submissions and triggers an automated welcome email via Resend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add a serverless function to handle form submission and trigger email'

steps.title: Instrument Performance Tracking
steps.description: Implement automated monitoring to see which traffic sources convert best, allowing for rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement PostHog analytics tracking for all CTA clicks and form submission events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add posthog tracking to the landing page components'

steps.title: Close the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Analyze the data to decide whether to pivot, persevere, or kill the project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a summary dashboard layout that visualizes user signups against traffic sources.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a simple dashboard component to visualize conversion data'

pro_tips: Never build an auth system until you have at least 50 confirmed waitlist signups.
Use 'smoke tests'—run a $20 ad spend to your landing page to see if people actually click before building the core feature.
Automate your 'Kill Switch': if conversion is below 2% after 500 visitors, move to the next idea immediately.
Keep your landing page copy focused on the user's pain, not your solution's features.
Use Claude Code to refactor your landing page copy based on the feedback from early waitlist survey responses.
content.next_steps: After your first 50 signups, conduct 5-minute interviews with the top 10 users to understand the 'why' behind their click.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to stop guessing and start building products that users actually crave. Stop letting your ideas wither in a folder—take control of your validation pipeline today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
